/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -pedantic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/spaceball_static.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/spaceball_static.dir/progs/demos/spaceball/spaceball.c.o CMakeFiles/spaceball_static.dir/progs/demos/spaceball/vmath.c.o -o bin/spaceball_static  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so lib/libglut.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -lm
